hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); case "$cmd" in "rm node_modules/xxscreeps/.screeps-ok-pin"|"rm -f node_modules/xxscreeps/.screeps-ok-pin") exit 0;; esac; first=$(printf '%s' "$cmd" | awk '{print $1}'); blocked=0; case "$first" in rm|mv|cp|rsync|tee|touch|chmod|chown|patch|sed|awk) printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE 'node_modules/@?xxscreeps' && blocked=1;; esac; printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '>>?\s*[^|]*node_modules/@?xxscreeps' && blocked=1; if [ "$blocked" = 1 ]; then echo 'Blocked: bash command would write into node_modules/(@)?xxscreeps. The pinned install tree is owned by scripts/build-xxscreeps.js (run npm run setup:xxscreeps to refresh). Do PR work in ~/Coding/Screeps/xxscreeps-pr-* worktrees instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
